mapper.select: SELECT image_url FROM textbook_images WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} ORDER BY image_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO textbooks (id, title, author, course_name, course_code, applicable_major, price, book_condition, notes, seller_id, seller_name, seller_major, seller_grade, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{author}, #{courseName}, #{courseCode}, #{applicableMajor}, #{price}, #{bookCondition}, #{notes}, #{sellerId}, #{sellerName}, #{sellerMajor}, #{sellerGrade}, #{status})
INSERT INTO textbook_images (id, textbook_id, image_url, image_type) VALUES (#{id}, #{textbookId}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM textbooks WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'deleted' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM textbooks WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} AND status != 'deleted' ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT * FROM textbooks
status = 'approved'
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR course_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR course_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR applicable_major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND applicable_major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
AND seller_grade = #{grade}
AND price = 0
AND price > 0 AND price <= 50
AND price > 50 AND price <= 100
AND price > 100
AND book_condition = #{condition}
ORDER BY price ASC
ORDER BY price DESC
ORDER BY publish_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM textbooks
status = 'approved'
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR course_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR course_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR applicable_major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND applicable_major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')
AND seller_grade = #{grade}
AND price = 0
AND price > 0 AND price <= 50
AND price > 50 AND price <= 100
AND price > 100
AND book_condition = #{condition}
mapper.update:
UPDATE textbooks
status = #{status}, approval_reason = #{approvalReason},
publish_time = NOW(),
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM textbooks WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT * FROM textbooks WHERE status = 'approved' AND course_code = #{courseCode} AND (applicable_major = #{major} OR applicable_major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')) ORDER BY publish_time DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT * FROM textbooks WHERE status = 'approved' AND course_code = #{courseCode} AND seller_id != #{excludeSellerId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN (applicable_major = #{major} OR applicable_major LIKE CONCAT('%', #{major}, '%')) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(publish_time, created_at) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM textbooks WHERE status = 'approved' AND course_code = #{courseCode} AND seller_id != #{excludeSellerId} ORDER BY COALESCE(publish_time, created_at) DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.update: UPDATE textbooks SET status = 'sold', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM textbooks WHERE status = 'approved' AND price = 0 ORDER BY COALESCE(publish_time, created_at) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE textbooks SET status = 'deleted', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
